name: Bean Curd with Oyster Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Soy bean curd (canned or Fresh)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the soy bean curd into 1/4-inch cubes and thinly slice the green onions.
2. Heat peanut oil in a hot wok until it just begins to smoke.
3. Add the sliced bean curd, green onions, and minced garlic to the wok. Stir gently to avoid breaking the curd and coat all pieces with oil.
4. Ensure the oil is not too hot; otherwise, the curd may stick to the pan.
5. When you can smell the aroma of garlic, add the chicken stock and bring it to a boil.
6. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for about 30 seconds (ensure the curd remains intact).
7. Remove the lid, stir in oyster sauce and sugar, then increase the heat.
8. Once the liquid boils again, add enough cornstarch paste to create a creamy sauce that is not too thick.
9. Swirl in additional peanut oil to form a glaze.
10. Serve over rice or in a shallow serving bowl.
